**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Newcom Optical & Electrical Communication Co., Ltd. presents a classic case of an active IT/Communication systems integrator and equipment reseller fundamentally misclassified by the registry as a 'Manufacturer of Electronic Devices'. The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been completely eradicated. While its scope begins with 'manufacturing of communication equipment', its physical reality tells a different story: registered on the 17th floor of an office building in Nanjing's Zhujiang Road (a famous IT retail hub) with a workforce of 31 employees, it possesses no heavy manufacturing capacity. Its true operations, confirmed by its corporate email domain (@jsnewcom.com) and the rest of its scope, revolve around the R&D, sales, and technical service of fiber optic cables, power cables, and communication hardware. It operates as an active, mid-sized B2B trading firm and system integrator, purchasing optical and electrical hardware from true OEMs to fulfill regional IT and telecom infrastructure projects.

Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
